nasb.text: The son of Eliezer was Rehabiah the chief; and Eliezer had no other sons, but the sons of Rehabiah were very many.

esv.text: The sons of Eliezer: Rehabiah the chief. Eliezer had no other sons, but the sons of Rehabiah were very many.

cnv.text: 以利以謝的第一個兒子是利哈比雅；以利以謝沒有別的兒子，利哈比雅卻有很多兒子。

ccb.text: 以利以谢只有一个儿子利哈比雅，但利哈比雅子孙众多。
